rationale: The only direct evidence is a DOI-level reference match (no in-text citation context or reference text), so there is insufficient signal to classify this as clearly incidental. The two papers share a broad TV-advertising effectiveness theme, but the cited study’s focus (ad content, online search, auto sales) differs from the citing paper’s focus (pay-TV choice, national vs. local advertising), making substantive use plausible but unconfirmed.
